purpose: Map generated descriptions into every visible app slot.
requirements: Remove all hardcoded 'Name unverified' and old placeholder personnel records.
Render Rutgers player cards from rutgers_roster_base.json players[].analysis.
Render recruiting-class cards from recruiting_class.json prospects[].analysis.
Render active-board cards from recruiting_weekly.json active_board and linked prospect analysis.
Render Purdue cards from purdue_opponent_players.json players[].ui_analysis.
Render matchup cards from purdue_matchups.json matchups[].description.
Hide fields that are null instead of printing repeated 'Not available'.
Do not show the four legacy quarterback summary boxes.
Use the two import workflow: gameplan_weekly.json and recruiting_weekly.json.
Future weekly video updates must regenerate both raw values and analysis descriptions.
